name: Crepes with Cream Cheese Filling
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 15 minutes
method: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, eggs, milk, water, and salt.
Stir in the butter and whisk until combined.
Warm a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat. Spray it with cooking spray.
Add some of the crepe batter. Swirl the pan around to make an even crepe.
Cook for 1 minute on each side. Set aside on a plate to cool slightly.
To make the filling, in a large mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese, vanilla extract, powdered sugar, whipped cream, and lemon juice until fluffy and creamy.
Fill each of the crepes with the cream cheese mixture. Top with the strawberries and fold into rolls.
